quote: "Your appearance gives the world a clue to your inner world."
author: Leonardo da Vinci

quote: Dreams make good stories, but everything important happens when we're awake because that's when we make things happen.
author: Duncan Idaho
about: Dreams and ideas are inspiring, but real change happens through action.

quote: No cost too great.
author: Hollow Knight

quote: "Without courage, wisdom bears no fruit."
author: Baltasar Gracián

quote: "No need to hurry, No need to sparkle. No need to be anybody but oneself"
author: Virginia Woolf

quote: "Courage starts with showing up and letting ourselves be seen."
author: Brené Brown

quote: You cannot swim for new horizons until you have the courage to lose sight of the shore.
author: William Faulkner

quote: Power resides where men believe it resides.
author: Varys
about: Power isn't something fixed. It comes from people's belief. Whoever people accept as powerful becomes powerful. If that belief is gone, that power disappears.

quote: Power resides where men believe it resides.
author: Varys
about: Power isn't something fixed. It comes from people's belief. Whoever people accept as powerful becomes powerful. If that belief is gone, that power disappears.

quote: The ability to speak several languages is an asset, but the ability to keep your mouth shut in any language is priceless.
author: Anonymous

quote: "You don’t have to control your thoughts. You just have to stop letting them control you."
author: Dan Millman

quote: "Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage."
author: Anaïs Nin

quote: "Sell your cleverness and buy bewilderment; cleverness is mere opinion, bewilderment is intuition."
author: Rumi

quote: "Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you have to keep moving"
author: Albert Einstein

quote: "A dream may open the door, but only truth deserves to stay."
author: Barid

quote: Learn from yesterday, live for today, hope for tomorrow. The important thing is not to stop questioning.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: "In three words I can sum up everything I've learned about life: It goes on"
author: Robert Frost

quote: "Stay curious like the universe—there’s always more beyond what you see."
author: Anonymous

quote: “Until you make the unconscious conscious, it will direct your life and you will call it fate.”
author: Carl Jung

quote: “Even a brick wants to be something.”
author: Louis Kahn

quote: "The moment you stop chasing what you think your life should be, you begin to discover what it truly is."
author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quote: "The best way out is always through"
author: Robert Frost

quote: "Freedom from the desire for an answer is essential to the understanding of a problem."
author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quote: "A warm smile is the universal language of kindness."
author: William Arthur Ward

quote: What Is Not Yours Is Not Yours
author: Helen Oyeyemi
about: What doesn’t belong to you will never truly stay with you. Accepting that helps you find peace and move forward.

quote: "The function of education is to teach one to think intensively and to think critically. Intelligence plus character — that is the goal of true education."
author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quote: "The best portion of a good person’s life is their little, nameless acts of kindness."
author: William Wordsworth

quote: You will have bad times, but they will always wake you up to the good stuff you weren’t paying attention to.
author: Sean Maguire
about: Bad situations can sometimes overwhelm us so much that we fail to notice the good things around us, because our focus is completely taken over by the problems we are facing.

quote: The world isn't perfect. But it's there for us, doing the best it can.
author: Roy Mustang
about: The world isn’t perfect and has many flaws.But it still gives us chances to live and move forward.

quote: We all make choices. But in the end, our choices make us.
author: Reverse Flash
about: Your life isn’t defined by luck or fate alone, it’s shaped by the decisions you make. Over time, those choices build your identity and determine who you become.

quote: “Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.”
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Which is worse? To die, or to be the one who survives? To grieve? Or to be grieved?
author: The Fading Man
about: This quote, a reflection on mortality and loss. Death affects both the one who dies and those left behind, raising difficult questions about grief, survival, and the emotional cost of living on.

quote: Is it a blessing to understand your darkest nature… Or a curse to which we turn a blind eye? We lie to ourselves all the time, don’t we? About things we’d rather not admit. Or confront.
author: The Fading Man
about: Self-awareness requires confronting uncomfortable truths about human nature. Ignoring our darker impulses may feel safer, but understanding them is essential to mastering them.

quote: Carpe diem. Seize the day, boys. Make your lives extraordinary.
author: John Keating
about: Live in the present, take opportunities, and make your life meaningful and remarkable instead of ordinary.

quote: I believe the things that are meant to happen always find a way to happen. Sometimes they make sense, sometimes they don’t, and sometimes they really hurt. But that’s okay, because those moments put us on the path to becoming who we’re meant to be.
author: Spider-man
about: Life doesn’t always make sense, and some moments hurt, but everything, good or bad, helps shape who we become.

quote: "No man is rich enough to buy back his past"
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: People come and people go but the only one that will be there for you is you. Little one there is more to life, if only you knew how big the sky truly is. Reach out your hand, and it's yours.
author: Unknown Journal Entry (Renoir)
about: I find this compelling because it transforms the existential weight of solitude into a source of absolute freedom. It moves beyond the fear of being alone to reveal that when "only you are there for you," you become the sole architect of a world as vast as you dare to imagine.

quote: Art can be a Window and art can be a Mirror. And great art… Great art is both. So, you’ll never be a true artist if there’s always a mask between you and the viewer, especially when the viewer is you…
author: Unknown Journal Entry (Renoir)
about: I like this quote because it highlights the dual nature of art as both an escape and a confrontation, a window to the infinite and a mirror to the soul. It’s an existentialist’s reminder that true creation requires the courage to look outward and inward simultaneously, stripping away every mask until only the raw truth remains.

quote: "The person you want to become is on the other side of the pain you are trying to avoid."
author: Sanjay N

quote: You speak to me of perfection, but is there really any such thing? Or is it a siren, leading us astray. I happily predict that neither of us will ever summit that elusive peak, but I care little, as long as we walk together. Art gives us the perception of control. For a moment, as I paint, I find order among the chaos. That is, for me, a moment of pure contentment. And that is truly better than perfection.
author: Unknown Journal Entry (Renoir)
about: It reminds me that contentment found in the journey is far more meaningful than the pursuit of a perfect end.

quote: When the whole world tells you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth and tell the whole world — ‘No, you move.’
author: Captain America
about: Even if everyone pressures you to give up your beliefs, you should stand firm in what you know is right. True strength is having the courage to defend the truth, even when you stand alone.

quote: There is a natural order to things. Things happen the way they do. We may not know why at the time, but there must always be a reason.
author: Henry Allen
about: Life follows a natural order. Even when events seem confusing or unfair, they happen for a reason that may only become clear later. It reflects the idea that every event has a purpose, even if it isn’t understood at the moment.

quote: "Sometimes you gotta run before you can walk."
author: Tony Stark

quote: "Life can only be understood backwards; but it must be lived forwards."
author: Søren Kierkegaard

quote: It’s not who I am underneath, but what I do that defines me.
author: Batman
about: Who you truly are is shown by your actions, not just your thoughts or intentions.

quote: Sometimes the only way to move forward is to go back and face the past.
author: Barry Allen (The Flash)
about: To truly progress in life, you must confront and accept your past instead of avoiding it.

quote: "When you have eliminated the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth"
author: Sherlock Holmes

quote: A man chooses. A slave obeys.
author: Andrew Ryan
about: Human dignity lies in the ability to choose. Autonomy and responsibility define freedom, while blind obedience strips away agency.

quote: Finding a rock and losing it is better than never finding a rock in the first place.
author: Esquie
about: Temporary experiences still hold value. Even if something is eventually lost, the meaning and joy it once brought remain worthwhile.

quote: "An investment in knowledge pays the best interest."
author: Benjamin Franklin

quote: The best roles are the ones that scare you a little.
author: Cillian Murphy
about: The most rewarding opportunities are often the ones that push you out of your comfort zone and challenge your abilities.

quote: We are not free in what we do because we are not free in what we want.
author: Arthur Schopenhauer
about: We think we’re free because we can choose what we do, but our desires and wants are not truly under our control.

quote: Hope is what makes us strong. It is why we are here. It is what we fight with when all else is lost.
author: Pandora
about: Hope is the force that keeps people moving forward even when victory seems impossible. It fuels resilience and gives meaning to struggle.

quote: It’s not how well you play that matters, but when you stop. If you lose after winning, the loss will be remembered. But if you win after losing, that victory will be remembered in history, because history only remembers how you finished.
author: Baskhar kumar
about: What truly defines a person is their final outcome. Early victories or failures don’t matter as much as how the journey ends, because people and history remember the final result.

quote: A sword wields no strength unless the hand that holds it has courage.
author: The Hero's Shade
about: Tools and power mean nothing without the courage to act. True strength comes from the will behind the weapon, not the weapon itself.

quote: The right man in the wrong place can make all the difference in the world.
author: G-Man
about: Individual actions can change the course of events. One capable person placed in the right moment can shift the trajectory of entire systems or histories.

quote: The closer you get to the light, the greater your shadow becomes.
author: Squall Leonhart
about: Success, power, and ambition magnify both strengths and flaws. The brighter someone shines, the larger the consequences of their mistakes.

quote: The darkest night comes just before the dawn.
author: Harvey Dent
about: Sometimes life feels hardest and most hopeless right before things begin to improve. The quote reminds us to stay strong and not give up, because better times may be closer than we think.

quote: No matter how dark the night, morning always comes.
author: Jin Sakai
about: A reminder that hardship and darkness are temporary. No matter how overwhelming things feel in the moment, time continues forward and change is inevitable.

quote: Real learning comes about when the competitive spirit has ceased.
author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quote: "You gain strength, courage, and confidence by every experience in which you really stop to look fear in the face."
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, but today is a gift. That is why it is called the present.
author: Master Oogway
about: The past is already gone and cannot be changed, and the future is uncertain. So the only time we truly have control over is today—this moment—so we should value it and use it wisely.

quote: "In the end, it’s not the years in your life that count. It’s the life in your years."
author: Abraham Lincoln

quote: Stay hungry. Stay foolish.
author: Steve Jobs
about: Always keep the desire to learn and never be afraid to try new or unconventional things.

quote: "Things may come to those who wait,but only the things left by those who hustle"
author: Find out!

quote: "It's not that I'm so smart, it's just that I stay with problems longer."
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Oh yes, the past can hurt. But the way I see it, you can either run from it… or learn from it.
author: Rafiki
about: The past may hurt, but you either avoid it or grow stronger by learning from it.

quote: "Mistakes are a fact of life. It is the response to the error that counts."
author: Nikki Giovanni

quote: A person should not be too honest. Straight trees are cut first and honest people are screwed first.
author: Chanakya

quote: Any fool can turn a blind eye but who knows what the ostrich sees in the sand.
author: Samuel Beckett

quote: “If you have two friends in your lifetime, you're lucky. If you have one good friend, you're more than lucky.”
author: S.E. Hinton

quote: "The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall."
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: The hardest choices require the strongest wills.
author: Thanos
about: The most difficult decisions in life can only be made by those with strong determination and mental strength.

quote: Everything that lives is designed to end. They are perpetually trapped in a never-ending spiral of life and death. However, life is all about the struggle within this cycle. That is what 'we' believe.
author: Pod 153
about: It acknowledges mortality without falling into nihilism, asserting that meaning is created through struggle within life’s ongoing cycle rather than beyond it.

quote: "It is no measure of health to be well adjusted to a profoundly sick society."
author: "Jiddu Krishnamurti"

quote: "Why do we fall sir? So that we can learn to pick ourselves up."
author: Alfred Pennyworth
about: Falling isn't weakness. Staying down is.

quote: The only easy day was yesterday.
author: US Navy SEALs
about: life doesn’t get easier, You grow stronger each day.

quote: "Success is nothing more than a few simple disciplines, practiced every day."
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Win in life by avoiding two things. Trying to change others and expecting from others.
author: life

quote: Nothing lasts forever. Not even the world. But we gotta keep it going as long as we can, right? Patch the holes, change the parts, all that. So we can say we had a good run. That we lived.
author: Sam
about: This quote values persistence and care in an impermanent world, even when survival itself feels temporary, which I think is poignant, in a 'bitter-sweet' way.

quote: "When the mind is free of fear, life unfolds in clarity."
author: "Jiddu Krishnamurti"

quote: I don’t believe in psychology. I believe in good moves.
author: Bobby Fischer

quote: Die to everything of yesterday so that your mind is always fresh, always young.
author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quote: A future is not given to you. It is something you must take for yourself.
author: Pod 042
about: I like this quote because it rejects destiny and reinforces the idea that the future is shaped through agency, responsibility, and deliberate action.

quote: It's not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
author: Epictetus

quote: Mistakes are a fact of life. It is the response to the error that counts.
author: NIKKI GIOVANNI

quote: Bullet chess kills your ideas
author: Hikaru Nakamura

quote: There is nothing noble in being superior to your fellow man. True nobility is being superior to your former self.
author: Ernest Hemingway

quote: I seek to learn and adopt all facets of humanity! Some desire love! Others family! Only then did I realize the truth...the core of humanity... is conflict. They fight. Steal. Kill. This is humanity in its purest form!
author: Adam
about: It resonates with my belief that conflict is fundamental to humanity and often acts as the driving force behind progress, innovation, and societal change. There isn't an example greater than the two world wars for this.

quote: When you're in the shit up to your neck, there's nothing left to do but sing.
author: Samuel Beckett.

quote: Change brings opportunity.
author: Nido Qubein

quote: There is more treasure in books than in all the pirate's loot on treasure island.
author: Walt Disney

quote: Every disiciplined day is an asset for your future greatness.
author: Lohendra V S

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: So often, a visit to a bookshop has cheered me, and remainded me that there are good things in the world.
author: Vincent Van Gogh

quote: Yhwach, the world that you desired to create may indeed have been devoid of fear. However, in a world without the fear of death, men could not face that fear and seek out hope. Certainly, they could keep walking onward by merely living, but that would be very different from walking onward while conquering their own fears. That is why we give the act of walking onward a special name. We call it 'courage'.
author: Aizen Sosuke
about: The quote matters to me because it argues that fear, struggle, and mortality are what give rise to courage, urgency, and meaningful direction in life.

quote: Failure doesn't mean game over. It means try again.
author: Game Wisdom
about: It is a lesson, not a defeat.

quote: Feel Pain. Accept Pain . Know Pain. One who does not know pain, does not know True Peace.
author: Pain
about: Pain teaches us need for peace

quote: The more you fear something happening, the more likely it is to occur.
author: Murphy’s Law
about: Anything that can go wrong, will go wrong. Fear and overthinking can increase mistakes, making what we dread more likely to happen. Calm preparation and adaptability turn possible failures into learning opportunities.

quote: Life doesn’t give us purpose. We give life purpose.
author: Barry Allen (The Flash)
about: Meaning isn’t handed to you by fate—you create it through your choices and actions.

quote: Not every journey becomes a chapter of life, but each one leaves us with memories and lessons that shape our present and guide our future.
author: Simon Peter
about: It reflects on how experiences—whether big or small—contribute lessons and memories that influence who we are and who we become.

quote: Stories allow you to experience places you could never go—the past, the future, or distant worlds. You can become a different ethnicity or gender. Even when you’re reading all by yourself, you're sharing those stories as they unfold before you with countless people whom you’ve never met. We are alone, but we are connected.
author: Hideo Kojima
about: It explains why fiction and art matter, as they create shared emotional experiences that build empathy beyond direct lived reality.

quote: As long as I live, there are infinite chances.
author: Monkey D. Luffy
about: Life itself gives endless opportunities

quote: "Waste no more time arguing what a good man should be. Be one."
author: Marcus Aurelius
